description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights.

reviews.hotelName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The price is quite affordable, the room is comfortable, the bathroom is clean, the location is quite strategic close to the Grand Baiturrahman Mosque, highly recommended.
comments.originalComment: Harga cukup terjangkau, kamarnya nyaman, kamar mandi bersih lokasi cukup strategis dekat masjid raya baiturrahman sangat rekomended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewNegatives: Not clean and not comfortable,the toilet is very small...the hotel see very bad not nice...management must renovation this hotel...

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Still under name of Nabila. No Redoorz's presence. Very very bad condition. I booked because " penginapan Syariah "  Used " Islamic term " to sell.  Dear Agoda : please delete this hotel from your list. Thank you. TV not working. No hot shower. Common kitchen looks like Tsunami just came. Reception area looks like Gaza !!
comments.reviewTitle: Rundown hotel. Sold to ReDoorz group

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewPositives: Near to Masjid Baitulrahman.. Walking distance only. And night have many stall nearby..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Have a 4 days 3 nights stay here, super happy because it’s near to the centre of Banda Aceh but turn out to be nightmare. I have a sore on my body maybe because of unclean bed sheet or blanket. The toilet is mossy and stagnant water. The room is quite big for two but no others facilities provided such as hair dryer since I can’t bring from my country.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewNegatives:
Cleanliness : terrible, dirty toilet.
Facilities : poor, electricity break down on 2nd day of stay. waited for 2-3 H for repair. End up with extension wire from front room with one light bulb on the floor.
comments.reviewPositives: location : walking distance to masjid baitul rahman
comments.reviewTitle: This is the last choice of hotel. Not worth for the price.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: haunted at night cant sleep due to numerous sound probably "something else" . location quite nice for sightseeing aroung banda acheh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Even though value for money, the cleanliness at least at minimum standard.
comments.reviewPositives: Value for money especially traveller to mosque

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: The room very dirty and smelly, the bathroom is very small and dirty. Their don’t clean properly and don’t have shower. Not very recommended for the price.  The AC is problem and at night have many mosquitoes.

comments.reviewComments: The Wisma Nabila hotel's lack of cleanliness tarnishes Banda Acheh's reputation as a tourist destination. Not recommended at all.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewComments: There are no doormats, and mineral water is also not available. Other than that, it is nice.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

comments.reviewNegatives: Firstly, didn’t like the bathroom , so smelly 😭 the wallpaper was super old , and there’s no lift provided , if you still insist to stay here , please don’t have any expectations
comments.reviewTitle: how I wish they can do renovations and make it the interior much more attractive

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Pengalaman yg menarik berada dua mlm di acheh. Pergi utk libur rohani, ziarah masjid baiturahman. Lokasi cantik. Boleh jln2 kaki sj ke tmpt muzium.
Staf ramah. Cuma harus diingat, ini penginapan satu bintang dgn harga yg setaraf utk fasiliti yg serba kurang. Jika anda diva, hotel ini tidak sesuai.
Cuma harus peka dgn kadar tukaran dlm Agoda. Pilih pay now. Boleh batal kemudian. Jika pay later, kadar matawang akan berubah, selalunya harga naik.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Just tndas berbau.. Yg lain ok jee

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Almost with the BaitulRahman Mosque. Grab transportation and young rickshaw taxi can be obtained.
comments.originalComment:
Hampir Dengan Masjid BaitulRahman.
Pengangkutan Grab Dan teksi beca muda dapat

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Friendly stafs. Near to masjid baiturrahman. Near to tempat makan. Love it

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: While the room was neatly made up and the floor clean, the walls and especially the bathroom are so badly water damaged and mouldy that I can’t recommend it. The plaster is crumbling off and the wallpaper peeling because of water damage. Windows can’t fully close so mosquitoes get in. Bathroom is literally falling apart.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Es un edificio un tanto antigüo...fuman mucho el encargado...pero cerca de la Masjid que es lo que queríamos

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Bel emplacement, on sent que l’hôtel a du potentiel mais il a l’air totalement laissé à l’abandon.. 
Le hall d’entrée n’est pas accueillant du tout et sale, tout comme la chambre… très abîmée, trous dans les murs, moisissure dans la sdb, etc… !
 On sent cependant que les draps ont été changé et que le ménage de surface a été fait mais la chambre est vraiment triste et semble sale « en profondeur ». 
Bon, au prix de la nuit, on ne peut pas vraiment se plaindre mais c’est à savoir quand vous réservez ! 
Le personnel est toutefois agreable et arrangeant

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: Cocok yang ingin berlibur dengan berjalan kaki

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: AC kurang dingin, tempat tidur dan lokasi kamar juga banyak semut kecil2

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 2 travelers found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments:
Отель обладает как минусами, так и плюсами. 
Расположение - очень удачное в самом центре города: Главная мечеть, рынок, Музей цунами - рядом. Остановка, с которой отправляются всё городские автобусы (Trans Koetaradja) - в порт, аэропорт, автовокзал - в 100 метрах. Однако в комнатах с окнами на улицу - шумно. 
Персонал мне не понравился. Зачастую на  reception нет вообще никого. Мы приехали в 11 a.m., и нас заставили доплатить 50000  idr за ранний заезд. Отель был пустой (всего ещё одна комнатам была занята), но нас поселили в худшую из оставшихся, как я полагаю (#302). Окна выходило на улицу.  Душ и ТВ были демонтированы! 
Само здание, мебель и прочее довольно новые, неплохого качества. Комната - просторная, есть шкаф и столик на колёсах. Кровать удобная. 
Wi-Fi - отвратительный: сигнал слабый, каждые 5-10 минут отключается. 
Если вы оказались в Банда Ачех проездом на остров Weh или обратно, вполне можно переночевать в Wisma Nabila

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The toilet smell so bad. Tandas tu berbau, dan lantai kotor. Perlu diberus. Selipar tiada, so perlu dibeli. You just get one towel, but you can ask for more. I think with the price, its still not worth it. One of the room got the water in toilet clogged. The location is nice, near the masjid, thats why i book this hotel. But if you want comfortable stay, not recommended. And if its just one night stay, i think its just ok. Harap kepada pihak hotel meningkatkan dari segi kebersihan. Terima kasih.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: very near to mosque and market

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: near mosque and market

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responderName: RedDoorz @ Wisma Nabila Syariah near Masjid Raya Baiturrahman Banda Aceh
comments.reviewComments: The accommodation is inexpensive and within walking distance of the Grand Mosque. Food street is easily accessible. The staff is friendly and helpful, however the wifi is intermittent. The hotels appear to be old and might benefit from upgrades to facilities such as bathrooms, walls, and ceilings.
comments.reviewTitle: Budget hotel near to grand mosque
